WordFeast Gospel Network

Advancing the frontiers of God's kingdom.

A Bible-believing, Spirit-filled church in Awka — teaching sound doctrine, leading people into a genuine relationship with Jesus, and raising kingdom leaders, entrepreneurs, and ambassadors for Christ.

About Us

Who We Are

WordFeast Gospel Network is a Bible-believing, Spirit-filled church founded by Apostle Chidiebere E. Amanoh. We are committed to bringing liberation to the land and salvation to every life by teaching sound doctrine, leading people into a genuine relationship with Jesus Christ, and helping them experience the transforming ministry of the Holy Spirit.

Through worship, prayer, Bible teaching, discipleship, and leadership development, we equip people to grow in faith, discover their God-given passion, and become ministers, leaders, kingdom entrepreneurs, and ambassadors for Christ.

A genuine encounter with Jesus, the sound teaching of His Word, and the transforming ministry of the Holy Spirit.
Our Founder
Apostle Chidiebere Emmanuel Amanoh
Apostolic Leader & Visionary

WordFeast Gospel Network was founded by Apostle Chidiebere Emmanuel Amanoh — an anointed visionary, apostolic leader, and servant of God with a burning mandate to advance the frontiers of God's kingdom. His passion for sound doctrine, the move of the Holy Spirit, and the empowerment of God's people has shaped the identity and mission of this church.

Under his leadership, WordFeast has grown into a prophetic and deliverance ministry that impacts lives locally and globally. His teaching is marked by insight, wisdom, and a deep commitment to raising ministers, kingdom-minded leaders, and entrepreneurs who will influence their world.

Worship · Word · Spirit

We gather for intense worship, sound teaching, and the move of the Holy Spirit.

Gather With Us

Events & Services

Weekly worship, and the conferences where the Lord meets with us through the year.

Weekly
Sunday Services
8:00am – 12:00pm
Weekly
Thursday Services
5:00pm – 8:00pm
AnnualFeb

Revealed Conference

An annual charismatic gathering where the Spirit of the Lord ushers and guides us — as a church and as individuals — into the year. Expect intense worship, a strong prayer atmosphere, and transformation through the Word, as God meets with you and gives insight, foresight, and instruction for the season ahead.

Jul 9–12Jul
Theme · Supernatural Shift

Speak Conference 2026

Join us at Speak Conference 2026 to take flight into the manifestation of the words the Lord has spoken to you. Thursday – Sunday, 9th – 12th July.

Register
Annual·

Lighted Conference

An annual season of illumination in the Word and the Spirit. Dates and theme to be announced — stay tuned across our channels.

AnnualDec

Thanksgiving Service

Join us for our annual thanksgiving service, where we come to openly worship God for how faithful He has been to us. Come and give thanks in the grandest style. December 2026.

AnnualDec

Workers' Appreciation Dinner

Our annual dinner, where we honour the workers of the church for submitting to the call of God by ministering before Him at WordFeast Gospel Network. December 2026.

Testimonies

Testimonies are prophetic seeds with the capacity to reproduce themselves.

Divine healing

"God healed my father of kidney and liver enlargement without leaving any trace. He also healed my sister of a serious injury that had cost her her womb — the doctors warned that she could never conceive without undergoing surgery. But God proved Himself even when all hope was lost; less than three months after they released her without any operation, she conceived without even realising it. It was only around her fifth month that she noticed she was carrying the child."

Precious T.
Gifts at work

"I want to thank God for activating the gift of the word of knowledge in my career. Whenever a patient comes to me complaining of one problem or another, the Holy Spirit reveals the root cause and even the tests to carry out. This has truly made my work so much easier. Hallelujah!"

Chinwe U.
Open doors

"Two years ago I was handed a Germany offer that was never even meant to be mine. I failed the required German exam twice and was already scheduled for my embassy interview before I had even passed — yet I was shown grace and given until July to rewrite it, all while juggling my own school lectures and exams. By God's mercy I finally passed, resubmitted my passport, and I'll be leaving Nigeria right after my finals, with my flight, feeding, and accommodation fully covered by my sponsors. I thank Apostle Chidi for the teachings and prayers — the global prayer over the world map at Revealed Conference 2025 was for me. Thank you, sir!"

Amarachi A.
Document your testimony

Share what God has done

Your testimony is a seed — it builds faith in someone else.

Thank you — to God be the glory.

We've received your testimony and will reach out if needed.
